LAW AND MOTION 302, ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT BALDWIN YUNG, CHERIE YUNG, TELAVA NETWORKS, INC., TELAVA MOBILE, INC. NOTICE OF MOTION TO COMPEL. THE MOTION TO COMPEL IS MOOT BASED ON THE REPRESENTATION OF PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL THAT ALL THE DISCOVERY THAT IS THE SUBJECT OF THE MOTION HAS BEEN PROVIDED. DEFENDANTS ARE AWARDED SANCTIONS OF $1390 (6 HOURS AT $225 PER HOUR AND A $40 MOTION FEE) TO BE PAID BY PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL ON OR BEFORE JUNE 8, 2012. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS BALDWIN YUNG, CHERIE YUNG, TELAVA NETWORKS, INC. AND TELAVA MOBILE, INC.'S MOTION FOR STATUTORY ATTORNEYS FEES AND SANCTIONS DUE TO FALSIFICATION OF EVIDENCE - THE MOTION FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT IS NOT ENTITLED TO RECOVER FEES FOR THE WHOLE CASE, BUT CAN RE-FILE TO REQUEST COSTS ASSOCIATED WITH REVIEWING THE ALLEGED FALSIFIED EVIDENCE AND FILING A MOTION FOR TERMINATION. THE MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES IS DENIED. (THE COURT WILL SIGN THE PROPOSED ORDER EMAILED TO THE COURT.) JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.

*** CASE DISMISSED *** REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JUN-11-2012. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, COUNSEL STEVEN WAISBREN PRESENT. APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANTS AND COUNSEL, CHUANPIS SANTILUKKA. MATTER WAS PASSED UNTIL 11:00 AM FOR PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO CONTACT HIS CLIENT. AT 11:00 AM, THE CASE WAS RECALLED AND THERE WAS NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. THE COURT ORDERED THE CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE FOR NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT MAY FILE AN APPROPRIATE MOTION FOR SANCTIONS FOR FEES AND COSTS. DEFENDANT TO PREPARE AN ORDER. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Statutory Attorneys Fees And Sanctions Due To Falsification Of Evidence; Memo Of P&A
Off Calendar Oct-30-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS BALDWIN YUNG, CHERIE YUNG, TELAVA NETWORKS, INC. and TELAVA MOBILE, INC.'S Motion For Statutory Attorneys Fees And Sanctions Due To Falsification Of Evidence - The motion for sanctions is denied without prejudice. Defendant is not entitled to recover fees for the whole case, but can re-file to request costs associated with reviewing the alleged falsified evidence and filing a motion for termination. The motion for attorney fees is denied. (The court will sign the proposed order emailed to the court.) Judge: Ernest Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.
